description: Subclass overrides parent method to throw an exception, violating the base class contract.
reasoning: The method _decodeEscaped() in NonBlockingUtf8JsonParserBase throws an UnsupportedOperationException (via VersionUtil.throwInternal()), which violates the contract of the base class (JsonParserBase/JsonParser) where this method is expected to return a valid character. This makes the subclass non-substitutable for the base class.
